Package lu.kbra.p4j.socket.client

Class P4JClient

java.lang.Object
lu.kbra.p4j.socket.client.P4JClient
All Implemented Interfaces:
Closeable, AutoCloseable, Runnable, P4JInstance, P4JInstance.P4JClientInstance, EventDispatcher
public class P4JClient extends Object implements P4JInstance.P4JClientInstance, EventDispatcher, Closeable, Runnable
This class represents the client-side Client connecting to the server.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface lu.kbra.p4j.socket.P4JInstance

    P4JInstance.P4JClientInstance, P4JInstance.P4JClientServerInstance, P4JInstance.P4JServerClientInstance, P4JInstance.P4JServerInstance

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    bind()
    Bind to a random available port on the local machine.
    void
    bind(int port)
    Bind to the specified port on the local machine.
    void
    bind(InetSocketAddress inetSocketAddress)
    Bind to the specified port on the local machine.
    void
    close()
    Closes the client socket.
    The client' socket will be closed and the port will be released.
    Doesn't dispatch a P4JConnectionEvent.ClientDisconnectedEvent.
    void
    connect(InetAddress remote, int port)
    Connect to the specified address and port on the remote machine.

    Connect to the specified address and port on the remote machine.

    Disconnects & closes the client socket
    And dispatches a P4JConnectionEvent.ClientDisconnectedEvent.

  • Field Details

    • MAX_PACKET_SIZE

      public static int MAX_PACKET_SIZE

  • Constructor Details

    • P4JClient

      public P4JClient(CodecManager codecManager, EncryptionManager encryptionManager, CompressionManager compressionManager)
      Parameters:
      codecManager - the client's codec manager
      encryptionManager - the client's encryption manager
      compressionManager - the client's compression manager

  • Method Details

    • bind

      public void bind() throws UnknownHostException
      Bind to a random available port on the local machine.
      Throws:
      UnknownHostException
      P4JClientException

    • bind

      public void bind(InetSocketAddress inetSocketAddress)
      Bind to the specified port on the local machine. If the port is 0, a random available port is chosen.
      Parameters:
      inetSocketAddress - the local address to bind to
      Throws:
      IOException - if the Socket cannot be created or bound

    • bind

      public void bind(int port) throws UnknownHostException
      Bind to the specified port on the local machine. If the port is 0, a random available port is chosen.
      Parameters:
      port - the port to bind to
      Throws:
      P4JClientException
      UnknownHostException

    • close

      public void close()
      Closes the client socket.
      The client' socket will be closed and the port will be released.
      Doesn't dispatch a P4JConnectionEvent.ClientDisconnectedEvent.
      Specified by:
      close in interface AutoCloseable
      Specified by:
      close in interface Closeable
      Throws:
      P4JClientException - if the client isn't started

    • connect

      public void connect(InetAddress remote, int port)
      Connect to the specified address and port on the remote machine.
      Parameters:
      remote - the remote address
      port - the remote port
      Throws:
      IOException - if the Socket cannot be connected

    • connect

      public void connect(InetSocketAddress inetSocketAddress)
      Connect to the specified address and port on the remote machine.

    • disconnect

      public void disconnect()
      Disconnects & closes the client socket
      And dispatches a P4JConnectionEvent.ClientDisconnectedEvent.
      Throws:
      P4JClientException - if the client isn't started

      public void dispatchEvent(P4JEvent event)
